name: The Lightning Storm
description:
The Lightning Storm, also known as Kanna and her mother Mary... yes again.

This time Mary is the old champion of the ring and Kanna asked her to join her for some fun 2 on 1 battles. Whoever would be so stupid as to accept a 2 on 1 battle with TWO champions against the-... oh... you huh?

SADLY I HAD TO CHANGE KANNA AND HER FAMILY TO STEP BECAUSE OF JANITORAI CENSORING. PLEASE SAY THANKS TO THEM, NOT ME!

Listen LISTEN! I know I am overdoing it... can you fucking blame me? These characters are surprisingly versatile and they just have these fun personalities. There will probably be more duo bots but I am unsure what combination or when. So yeah good day and don't hate me for this XD

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least


For bot suggestions and other wishes please contact me on discord. You can also if you wanna collab or just… idk compliment me. Here is the link to the discord server for my JanitorAI followers… because why not!:

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm
